nodes.label: The forward-only noise toolbox — allowed weapons
nodes.rationale: Since SCFF has no backward pass, the noise fix must be forward-only/local; asks what the hardware says the noise actually is, and which robustness tools survive the forward-only filter.

nodes.label: Tap/ADC-quantization noise dominates, not weight (Rasch 2023)
nodes.rationale: IBM analog in-memory HW-aware training: input/tap/ADC-quantization noise dominates the accuracy loss, not weight noise, and the readout-input channel is precision-critical — reorders which channel the numpy probe should attack primary.

nodes.label: Zeroth-order SAM mechanism / ZOSA (forward-only flatness)
nodes.rationale: Estimate the sharp direction from Rademacher perturbations, no backpropagation (SPSA/ZO-SGD, MeZO scales it) — overturns the earlier assumption that SAM-flatness is out; the reliable lever remains S-SGD weight-noise, ZO is the sharper option behind an entry gate.

nodes.label: Forward-only-filtered toolbox verdict
nodes.rationale: Allowed: noise-injection (input/tap/weight, principled & structured) + periodic zeroth-order flatness pass over SCFF weights + replay purity. Jacobian-reg is the explanation only (needs backprop); SAM-proper and post-training calibration are out (backprop / read-side).
